description_long: This is a classic regulatory stop sign featuring an octagonal red face with a bold white border and the word 'STOP' in large, uppercase white letters at the center. The sign is mounted on a vertical metallic pole, which is cylindrical and appears to be made of galvanized steel. The front face is smooth and likely reflective, designed for high visibility in urban environments. The rear of the sign shows some weathering and rust, indicating exposure to outdoor elements. The sign is of standard size, suitable for placement at road intersections to control vehicle and pedestrian traffic. The overall construction is robust, intended to withstand various weather conditions and impacts.
description: A red octagonal stop sign with white uppercase lettering, mounted on a metallic pole and designed for roadside visibility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical pole.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the red octagonal face with white 'STOP' text and border.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and some edge detail.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the weathered, rusted back of the sign and the supporting pole.
